KnoWMi — Wear Your Digital Identity

India's first QR-enabled identity t-shirt. Wear your world. Share your story. Connect instantly with one scan.

Everything Your Identity Needs

  • Direct Scanner Tracking: See which city and device scanned your tee in real-time.
  • Dynamic Custom Profile: Instantly edit your bio, social links, custom buttons, and portfolio without buying a new t-shirt.
  • Premium Streetwear Quality: Heavyweight 220 GSM combed cotton. High-durability printed QR code built to last 50+ washes.
  • Centralized Team Dashboard: Central panel to distribute codes and manage squads/teams.

Transparent, Fair Pricing

  • Creator Plan (₹699): One premium QR tee, lifetime free dynamic profile, standard analytics.
  • Pro Plan (₹49/mo): Advanced real-time analytics, professional profile templates, custom branding.
  • Team Plan (₹899 per member): Custom group ordering for 4+ members, centralized branding, team-wide profile dashboard.

Claim Your Identity Today

Pre-order your KnoWMi QR-enabled Tee now and get lifetime Pro access if you are among the first 100 wearers!
